The '''first person''' is one of the four [[grammatical persons]] in Aelaki. It refers to the speaker.

== Ki Syllables ==

First person [[Ki]] syllables vary by [[gender]]:

{| class="wikitable"
! Gender !! Ki Syllable !! Word-Final Form
|-
| Child || thu || -uth
|-
| Female || tho || -oth
|-
| Male || tha || -ath
|}

== Absence of Pronouns ==

Aelaki has no first person pronouns. Canonical pronouns have disappeared from the language; [[Ki]] endings now carry person information instead. Where pragmatic nuance is needed, [[pseudopronouns]] — full nouns inflected with Ki suffixes — are used.

== Non-Dropped First Person Noun Types ==

Although first person marking is typically carried by Ki affixes alone, certain noun types are not dropped when declined in the first person:

* '''My-type nouns''' — inalienable possessive body parts (e.g., ''gatharath'' 'my body')
* '''1p→3p nouns''' — nouns declined in [[third person]] for jussive/optative constructions
* '''Social nouns''' — relationship nouns, usually dyadic (e.g., ''dzahabath'' 'mother-child pair')
* '''Common pronominalized nouns''' — nouns declined in first person, used in official or formal contexts (e.g., ''pathasath'' 'my name')

== Pseudopronouns ==

Several [[pseudopronouns]] involve first person reference:

{| class="wikitable"
! Gloss !! Pseudopronoun !! Notes
|-
| 'you + me (alone)' || Thijith || child gender, exclusive
|-
| 'you + me (few others)' || Thishith || inclusive, paucal
|-
| 'you + me (many others)' || Thikith || inclusive, plural
|-
| 'mother-child pair (1st person)' || Dzahabath || root ''dzahab'' + 1sg Ki
|-
| 'my body' || Gatharath || pedagogical 1sg form
|-
| 'my name' || Pathasath || pedagogical 1sg form
|}

== Verb Agreement ==

In verb agreement, first person Ki markers appear in the following positions:

* '''Transitive verbs''': prefix Ki (subject) and suffix Ki (object)
* '''Intransitive active verbs''': prefix Ki (subject)
* '''Intransitive stative verbs''': suffix Ki (subject)

== See Also ==

* [[Second person]]
* [[Third person]]
* [[Fourth person]]
* [[Ki]]
* [[Pseudopronouns]]

[[Category:grammatical persons]]
[[Category:git synced pages]]
